conta.title: My Account
conta.notificacoes_desc: Get a daily notification when your ritual is ready. You can disable it at any time.

step1.title: Welcome to Akasha OS
step1.description: Your integrated spiritual self-knowledge system. Explore the four pillars: Kabbalah, Astrology, Ifá, and Tantra.

step2.title: Set Up Your Ritual
step2.description: Choose time and components for your personalized daily ritual.

step3.title: Track Your Progress
step3.description: View statistics, streaks, and history on your personal Dashboard.

step4.title: Begin Your Journey
step4.description: Do your first recommended practice based on your personal code.

mandato.leiaEmVozAlta: Read aloud. Notice what resonates most.
mandato.tresFrasesDesc: Three phrases that condense the energetic message of your chart for today.
mandato.roleParaBaixo: Scroll down for the next section ↓
mandato.respire: Breathe. Let the answer emerge before seeking words.
mandato.textareaPlaceholder: What's the first answer that comes, before the mind judges?
mandato.naoJulgue: What's the first answer that comes, before the mind judges?
mandato.salvoLocal: Saved only in your browser — no server submission.
mandato.suaSemente: Your seed of the day — intention derived from your chart
mandato.cvvReconhece: The Akasha Mentor recognizes signs of emotional distress in your intention and, by ethical design, steps back. Talk now with someone trained to listen, for free and 24h:
mandato.cvvNome: CVV — Centro de Valorização da Vida
mandato.indisponivelDesc: We couldn't calculate today's Mandate ({status}). Please try again in a moment.

errorBoundary.mensagem: We couldn't load your energetic Diary. Please try again in a moment.

ritual.explicaContaCantiga: Cabalistic Numerology works with numbers as resonance codes. This ritual activates the vibration of your base number in the context of the day.
ritual.explicaRespiracao: Astrology asks you to align with the celestial rhythm. Breathing with the Moon and the sign dissolves mental resistance.
ritual.explicaVarredura: Tantric Numerology holds that each subtle body carries memories. Passing 11 breaths through each one mobilizes dormant energy.
ritual.explicaOracao: The Birth Odu is your oral signature. Thanking the Ori before acting establishes presence and discernment.
ritual.explicaIching: The I Ching reveals ongoing mutations. Writing 1 word per mutable line anchors perception before the mind interprets.

significado.instrucao: Read each Pillar in order. Note the Shadow first (what you tend to refuse), then the Practice (the antidote). At the end, see how they connect.

areas.leiaInstrucao: Read from left to right — from professional to intimate.

tratamento.title: Integrated Treatment
